name_en: 🔥 New Version Geometric Bag Small Nappa Suede Featherlight Puzzle Handbag, Original Imported Nappa Calfskin 💥 Outlined by unique geometric lines, the rectangular shape. Soft and lightweight Nappa leather gives the handbag a casual and lazy style. *Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or carried by hand *Removable adjustable shoulder strap, featuring a rotating buckle *Zipper closure, articulated zipper puller *One external zippered back pocket, one internal slip pocket *Removable, featuring a hidden pocket and balloon dice *Rectangular metal studs 💡 This small size version is made of soft Nappa calfskin *Small Puzzle can hold for example a large wallet 👛 all sizes of phones 📱 and sunglasses 🕶 Can be carried crossbody, shoulder, handbag, or top handle *Removable 💙💚
name_cn:
🔥 New Version Geometric Bag Small Nappa Suede Featherlight Puzzle Handbag, Original Imported Nappa Calfskin 💥 Outlined by unique geometric lines, the rectangular shape. Soft and lightweight Nappa leather gives the handbag a casual and lazy style. *Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or carried by hand *Removable adjustable shoulder strap, featuring a rotating buckle *Zipper closure, articulated zipper puller *One external zippered back pocket, one internal slip pocket *Removable, featuring a hidden pocket and balloon dice *Rectangular metal studs 💡 This small size version is made of soft Nappa calfskin *Small Puzzle can hold for example a large wallet 👛 all sizes of phones 📱 and sunglasses 🕶 Can be carried crossbody, shoulder, handbag, or top handle *Removable 💙💚
Color: Brownie Dark Brown
Style No.: 9096
Dimensions: 24CM~16CM~10CM
